_description: Side-by-side comparison: intro → comparison split → deep dive each side → verdict → outro
title: Thing A vs Thing B
subtitle: Understanding the Difference — Like One Academy

sections.text: Why this comparison matters. What problem are people solving when they face this choice? Frame the decision.

sections._notes: leftColor and rightColor are optional — defaults to blue/purple.

sections.text: Deep dive into Thing A. When does it shine? What are its tradeoffs? Give concrete examples.

sections.label: Thing A in Practice
sections.code:
// Thing A approach
const result = thingA.solve(problem);

sections.text: Deep dive into Thing B. Same treatment — when it wins, when it doesn't. Be fair and honest.

sections.label: Thing B in Practice
sections.code:
// Thing B approach
const result = thingB.solve(problem);

sections.text: The verdict. Don't be wishy-washy — give a clear recommendation based on context. 'If you need X, use A. If you need Y, use B.'

sections.quote: A quote that captures the wisdom of choosing the right tool for the job.

sections.heading: Like One Academy
sections.subtext: Next: Deep Dive into the Winner
